title: Study Design and Viral Genomic Data Retrieval
description: Raw data retrieval for Dengue and Zika viruses from NCBI/UniProt.

title: Sequence Quality Control and Filtration
description: Filtering out incomplete, redundant, or low-quality sequences.

title: Multiple Sequence Alignment and Identifying Conservation
description: Aligning sequences to find conserved domains across Dengue and Zika.

title: Phylogenetic Analysis
description: Evolutionary relationship and clustering of the viral sequences.

title: Physicochemical Profiling of Conserved Domains
description: Expasy ProtParam profiling (Molecular weight, pI, instability, etc.).

title: Epitope Screening and Selection (B-cell, CTL, HTL)
description: Prediction of immunogenic epitopes and filtering by antigenicity, allergenicity, and toxicity.

title: Multi-Epitope Vaccine Assembly and Physicochemical Profiling
description: Linking epitopes with adjuvants/linkers and checking the final construct.

title: Structural Modeling, Refinement, and Validation
description: 2D and 3D modeling of the vaccine construct, refinement, and Ramachandran validation.

title: Conformational Epitope Mapping
description: Mapping 3D structural B-cell epitopes using ElliPro.

title: Molecular Docking Analysis
description: Docking the vaccine construct against immune receptors (e.g., TLR2/TLR4).

title: In Silico Restriction Cloning and Codon Optimization
description: Reverse translation, GC content optimization (JCat), and plasmid mapping.
